needs.summary: List of paid subscriptions across all businesses, one row per subscription, joined to the business display name.
fields: plan (market|business|wholesale|enterprise as rendered; NOTE fixture predates rev 2 five-plan ladder)
needs.filters/actions: Filter by source (all|google_play|app_store|direct_invoice) and by state (all|active|grace|canceled); admin paged-table convention ?page=&limit= applies.
needs.adminRole: superadmin (conventions matrix lists billing among the surfaces support may not touch; if 'touch' is later ruled write-only, reads could widen to both)

needs.summary: List of billing transactions for the current month: subscription renewals, credit bundle purchases and enterprise invoices, with store-fee breakdown.
fields: sku (store/invoice SKU string, e.g. oweme_credits_600, oweme_business_monthly, oweme_ent_60m_jul26)
needs.filters/actions: Free-text search across business name, SKU and type label; implicit period filter = current month (section subtitle says 'this month'); ordered newest first as rendered.

needs.summary: Headline billing aggregates for the stat cards: active subscription count, grace (failed-renewal) count, MRR as sum of active plan prices, and total store fees for the current month.
fields: mrrKobo (sum of priceKobo over state=active subscriptions)
storeFeeKobo (sum of storeFeeKobo over current-month transactions)
needs.filters/actions: Currently derived client-side from the two lists (page.tsx lines 159-170); backend may either return complete unpaginated lists or expose these aggregates directly. If lists are paginated, aggregates MUST come from the server or the cards will be wrong.

surfaces.surface: Stat card row (Active subscriptions, MRR, Store fee this month, Failed renewals)
surfaces.evidence: page.tsx:153 destructures billingDemoData and page.tsx:159-170 computes all four stats from those fixture arrays, rendered as live at lines 200-224.
page.tsx:248-252 renders DataTable rows={visibleSubscriptions}, which page.tsx:172-180 filters straight from fixture billingDemoData.subscriptions (billing.ts:40-158).
page.tsx:232-237 controlled Select updating local sourceFilter state that only filters the fixture array; no request leaves the page.
page.tsx:238-243 controlled Select updating local stateFilter state applied to fixture data only.
page.tsx:273-278 renders DataTable rows={visibleTransactions} derived at page.tsx:182-191 from fixture billingDemoData.transactions (billing.ts:159-300).

surfaces.surface: Transactions search input (business, SKU or type)
